summary: Repackaged Fox News footage (anchor Harris Faulkner plus Capitol Hill testimony from Secret Service Director Sean Curran warning of a threat uptick) overlaid with a White House text banner blaming Democrats for a 72-day DHS shutdown. It is a re-posted TV news clip with a political header, not a music-driven produced spectacle.
notable_text: On-screen: 'Democrats Have Shut Down the Department of Homeland Security for 72 Days' / 'USSS DIR WARNS OF SIGNIFICANT UPTICK IN THREATS'.
